# vercel_project_delegated_protection (Data Source)

Provides a Project Delegated Protection data source.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "vercel_project_delegated_protection" "example" {
  project_id = vercel_project.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `project_id` (String) The ID of the Project to read delegated protection for.

### Optional

- `team_id` (String) The ID of the team the Project exists under. Required when configuring a team resource if a default team has not been set in the provider.

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID used for delegated protection.
- `cookie_name` (String) The cookie name used for delegated protection.
- `deployment_type` (String) The deployment environment protected by delegated protection.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for this data source.
- `issuer` (String) The issuer URL of the OIDC provider used for delegated protection.
